title: Polyceratocarpus oligocarpus
taxonomy: Polyceratocarpus oligocarpus is a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae, commonly known as the pea family. This classification suggests that Polyceratocarpus oligocarpus is closely related to other plants within the same family. The Leguminosae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes a wide range of species, from herbs to trees. Within the Leguminosae family, Polyceratocarpus oligocarpus is further classified as a member of the subfamily Papilionoideae. This subfamily includes many species of flowering plants with similar characteristics, such as pea-like flowers and compound leaves.
